outOfScope: Step 1 adds `Unsupported bool` to `domain.CertificationRecord` in `internal/domain/record.go`. The issue non-goals state: "Do not modify … domain types." If the field already exists from parent issue #25, remove Step 1. problemStatement: Update report consumers to skip Unsupported records in aggregate calculations
userValue: Plan serves the intent but Step 1 adds a field to domain types, contradicting the explicit non-goal "Do not modify … domain types"
